items.title: Huge $450 discount knocks Lenovo’s Legion 5i OLED gaming laptop with RTX 5070 GPU down to its lowest price today
items.summary:
We are now tracking a deal at Walmart that drops Lenovo’s Legion 5i RTX 5070-powered OLED gaming laptop down to $1,399 shipped. This Intel-powered notebook typically sells for around $1,850, so today’s deal delivers a solid $451 discount. For comparison, configuring the same Legion 5i directly through Lenovo’s online store would cost about $1,830, making Walmart’s offer a noticeably better deal with over $450 in savings. This variant with a 14th-gen Core i9 processor briefly dropped to $1,399 before jumping back up in price, and today’s deal marks the return of that all-time low once again in case you missed it last month. Head below for more details.

items.title: Power your spring adventures with up to 62% EcoFlow power station discounts in latest sale starting from $169
items.summary:
Now that EcoFlow’s Monthly Madness event has ended, the brand has shifted to its Spring Sale promotions with up to 62% discounts across its power stations, with free a FREE 45W solar panel given to orders that hit $600 and a FREE 220W solar panel on orders over $2,500. Among the models retaining their previous sale pricing, we spotted EcoFlow’s DELTA 3 Classic Portable Power Station going for $449 shipped, which matches the price we’re seeing over in the brand’s Amazon storefront. This particular model has been keeping down from its full $599 price tag since January, with discounts over the last year having gone as low as $349, which we last saw during Black Friday. This same rate has been holding strong through the last few sales we’ve seen through February (outside of some one-day flash sales), with it continuing into this month with a $150 markdown that lands it just $100 above the Black Friday low. Head below to learn more about it, as well as browse the full lineup of deals to power your spring time adventures.

more…

items.title: Metroid Prime 4 Nintendo Switch 2 Edition is down at $55 today (Reg. $70), more
items.summary:
Woot is now offering the Metroid Prime 4: Beyond Nintendo Switch 2 Edition down at one of the better prices we have tracked today, especially if you happened to have missed out on the 1-day Woot sale last month. Regularly $70, you can now score a proper U.S. boxed copy down at $54.99 Prime shipped. A $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise. It is still fetching nearly full price at Amazon where it has never sold for less than $65. While this one might not have ended being the epic long-time Metroid and Metroid Prime fans were hoping for, this is a solid chance to give it a run and add it to your Switch collection. I happen to think it is very much worth a play though at this price and there’s no telling how long it will take to see it down at $40 or less.

items.title: New MacBook Neo pre-order deals now live: Starting from $599 with FREE $25 gift card
items.summary:
Update: Best Buy is now offering FREE $25 gift cards with pre-orders of the new MacBook Neo.

Alongside the pre-order deals we are tracking on the new M5 MacBook Air and the M5 Pro MacBook Pro, Apple has now unleashed one of its most affordable new portable machines in years with the new MacBook Neo. Coming in at a starting price at $599, this is one of the most accessible MacBook releases to date and pre-orders are now going live at Best Buy with a bonus $25 gift card thrown in, and if you have some store credits or gift cards, there are deals to be had.
